description: §17 Worked Example 1 (valid) verbatim — `<span else>` immediately following `<span if=@loggedIn>` at the same parent level is a well-formed two-branch chain and does NOT fire E-CTRL-001. W-PROGRAM-SPA-INFERRED co-fires incidentally at severity info; not asserted.
rationale: §17.1.1: an `if=` chain is the maximal contiguous sequence of sibling elements beginning with `if=` followed by zero or more `else-if=` and optionally one final `else`. An `else` properly preceded by an `if=` sibling satisfies the E-CTRL-001 precondition, so the code SHALL stay silent. This is the SPEC's own flagship valid example (§17 Worked Examples, Example 1).
